# StreamFlix React Project Instructions

This is a React-based streaming platform project using Vite and Tailwind CSS.

## Project Structure
- Built with React 18 and Vite for fast development
- Styled with Tailwind CSS for responsive design
- Components organized for streaming platform features
- Modern TypeScript support

## Development Guidelines
- Use functional components with hooks
- Follow Tailwind utility-first approach
- Maintain responsive design principles
- Keep components modular and reusable

## Key Features
- Movie/series browsing interface
- Responsive grid layouts
- Modern streaming platform UI
- Tailwind CSS styling system
